help_menu: рҹҺө рқ—Әрқ—өрқ—®рқҳҒ рқҳ„рқ—јрқҳӮрқ—№рқ—ұ рқҳҶрқ—јрқҳӮ рқ—№рқ—¶рқ—ёрқ—І рқҳҒрқ—ј рқ—ұрқ—ј? Choose a section below.
help_admins: рҹӣ  GКҖбҙҸбҙңбҙҳ CбҙҸЙҙбҙӣКҖбҙҸКҹs /setup check readiness /settings personalize the group /pause В· /resume В· /skip В· /stop /seek 15 move forward 15 seconds
help_auth: рҹ‘Ө PКҹбҙҖКҸКҷбҙҖбҙ„бҙӢ Aбҙ„бҙ„бҙҮss Reply with /auth to let someone control playback. Use /unauth to remove access.
help_blist: Blacklist commands: Blacklisted chats and users cannot use the bot. /blacklist [chat_id|user_id]: Add a chat/user to the blacklist. /unblacklist [chat_id|user_id]: Remove a chat/user from the blacklist
help_lang: рҹҢҗ LбҙҖЙҙЙўбҙңбҙҖЙўбҙҮ Use /language and choose from the list.
help_ping: вңЁ BбҙҸбҙӣ /ping check availability /stats view service status
help_play: рҹҺө PКҹбҙҖКҸ MбҙңsЙӘбҙ„ /play song or link /vplay song or link for video -f play now В· -a force audio В· -v force video
help_queue: вҳ° QбҙңбҙҮбҙңбҙҮ Use /queue to view upcoming tracks. Use /loop 2 to repeat the current track.
help_stats: рҹ“Ҡ SбҙӣбҙҖбҙӣбҙңs Use /stats for a compact service overview.
help_sudo: вҡҷпёҸ Sudo tools рҹӨ– Assistants /sessions open manager /addsession add securely /enablesession В· /disablesession /restartsession В· /removesession рҹ“Ҡ Operations /activevc active calls /broadcast broadcast a replied message /status advanced status /logs application log /setlog choose log group /logger pause or resume logs /restart restart the bot вҡҷпёҸ Configuration /config safe runtime settings /setconfig В· /resetconfig рҹ‘Ө Access /addsudo В· /rmsudo рҹ§Ә /eval execute a Python snippet
